help.title: Kurotan Help
help.detail:
[Overview]
Unofficial fan-made desktop mascot app that visualizes Claude Code session status.

=== Basic usage ===

[Launch]
Start kurotan from the Start menu. A tray icon stays resident and a mascot appears at the bottom-right of the desktop.

[Mascot controls]
- Drag: move the mascot (position is restored on restart)
- Right-click: session info / realign / show Kantan Button etc.
- Tray right-click: app-wide settings

[Settings]
Tray -> Settings: art style / behavior / bubble design / language.

=== Features ===

[Mascot states]
- idle: standby
- thinking: processing
- tool_*: running a tool (Read / Edit / Bash / Web / Skill etc.)
- success: task done
- error: error
- farewell: session ended
- offline: waiting
- permission: awaiting approval
- sleep: sleep motion

[Speech bubbles]
On spawn / on subagent call / on task complete / sleep talk.

[Child kurotan (subagents)]
When the parent runs Agent / Task tools, child mascots line up next to it and work together.

[Sleep motion]
Sleeps when left alone. Hover the cursor to wake.

[Kantan Button (Easy Button)]
Floating bar for one-click text send.
- +: add a button
- Right-click a button: edit label / send text
- X: close bar
- Drag edges: resize
- Japanese input supported (via clipboard)
Send target: whatever window is in the foreground when you press the button. Intended for terminals running the Claude Code CLI (VSCode integrated terminal / Windows Terminal / cmd / PowerShell etc.).

[Focus target (target capture)]
Use this when re-focusing the target each time is tedious:
1. Press the target icon -> 3-second countdown
2. During the countdown, move the cursor onto the target input area
3. The cursor position at the end of the countdown is stored
4. From then on, button presses auto-move + click the stored position to focus the target window before sending
- Right-click target icon: clear the stored target (revert to sending to foreground)

[Permission mode]
- Auto (recommended): auto-approve
- Custom: per-tool approval dialog

[Hooks]
Auto-registered on first launch. To reinstall / remove, use Settings -> Hooks Installer.

[Multi-session]
When you run multiple Claude Code instances, one kurotan per session lines up.

=== System info ===

[System requirements]
- Windows 10 (1903+) / 11 (x64)
- 4 GB RAM or more / 250 MB free disk
- See README for full requirements
- Compatible Claude Code: CLI / Desktop app (Web claude.ai not supported)

[Privacy]
- All data is stored only on the local machine
- Nothing is sent to any external server
- No telemetry / analytics (details: EULA §4)

[Uninstall]
- Control Panel -> Apps and Features -> kurotan -> Uninstall
- User data (%APPDATA%\kurotan\) is kept for reinstall
- Delete that folder manually for a complete removal

[Support]
- Bugs / requests: file an issue on the distribution GitHub repo
- Do not contact Anthropic (this is unofficial fan-made)

[Disclaimer]
Unofficial fan-made app for Claude Code. Not affiliated with Anthropic. Free, non-commercial, personal use only.
about.title: Kurotan About
about.detail:
This app is an unofficial fan-made app for
Anthropic / Claude Code (Unofficial / Fan-made).

Anthropic and Claude are trademarks of Anthropic PBC.
This app is not affiliated with Anthropic in any way.

Free, non-commercial, personal use only.
